scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: gh-usage
commands.title: GH Usage
commands.description: View your GitHub API rate limit usage

commands.name: gh-usage-stats
commands.title: GH Usage Stats
commands.description: Refresh GitHub API rate limit stats in the background

preferences.name: subtitleTemplate
preferences.title: Subtitle Template
preferences.description: Template for the launcher subtitle. Core: {coreRemaining}, {coreUsed}, {coreLimit}, {corePct}. GraphQL: {graphqlRemaining}, {graphqlUsed}, {graphqlLimit}, {graphqlPct}. Search: {searchRemaining}, {searchUsed}, {searchLimit}, {searchPct}. Code Search: {codeSearchRemaining}, {codeSearchUsed}, {codeSearchLimit}, {codeSearchPct}. Integration: {integrationRemaining}, {integrationUsed}, {integrationLimit}, {integrationPct}.

commands.name: menubar-gh-usage
commands.title: GH Usage Menu Bar
commands.description: Show GitHub API rate limits in the menu bar

preferences.name: menuBarResource
preferences.title: Displayed Resource
preferences.description: Which rate limit resource to show in the menu bar title

preferences.name: menuBarTemplate
preferences.title: Menu Bar Title Template
preferences.description: Template for the menu bar title. Selected resource: {remaining}, {used}, {limit}, {pct}, {warning}. Core: {coreRemaining}, {coreUsed}, {coreLimit}, {corePct}. GraphQL: {graphqlRemaining}, {graphqlUsed}, {graphqlLimit}, {graphqlPct}. Search: {searchRemaining}, {searchUsed}, {searchLimit}, {searchPct}. Code Search: {codeSearchRemaining}, {codeSearchUsed}, {codeSearchLimit}, {codeSearchPct}. Integration: {integrationRemaining}, {integrationUsed}, {integrationLimit}, {integrationPct}.

preferences.name: refreshInterval
preferences.title: Refresh Interval
preferences.description: How often to refresh rate limit data

preferences.name: customGhPath
preferences.title: Custom gh Path
preferences.description: Override the path to the gh binary if it is not found automatically
